meta.title: Dashboard Information Architecture
meta.description: Tree diagram: 'Dashboard' root at top, four child sections below (Live view, Settings, Admin, Incidents), each with 4-5 leaf bullet items. Settings and Admin carry an ADMIN badge.

canvas.style_notes: Flat dark UI. NOT photographic. NOT 3D. Subtle grid background.

diagram_spec.tree_lines: Connect root node down to a horizontal busbar at y_pct ~0.16, then drop a thin vertical line from the busbar to the top of each child node. All lines in muted white (rgba(255,255,255,0.10)).
diagram_spec.child_node_styling: Rounded rectangles with title only (no subtitle), accent border per spec. Width about 220px, height about 50px.
diagram_spec.leaf_styling: Bullet items hang off a thin vertical line dropping from the LEFT edge of each child node. Each item is a thin horizontal tick line + plain-text label in muted grey, sans-serif, 14px. Items stack vertically with consistent 28px spacing.
diagram_spec.admin_badge_styling: Small pill badge labelled 'ADMIN' (caps, letter-spacing) in purple, attached to the top-right corner of nodes flagged admin_only.

footer_caption.text: The dashboard splits into four top-level sections. Admin-only branches are gated on the Pro / Pro Plus plan.

exact_text: The dashboard splits into four top-level sections. Admin-only branches are gated on the Pro / Pro Plus plan.
constraints.do_not_render_metadata: do NOT render any color hex codes, rgba() values, x_pct/y_pct positioning values, or any JSON metadata as visible text. Visible text must come ONLY from the exact_text array.
constraints.rendering_notes: Premium technical-doc tree diagram. Crisp typography. Settings and Admin nodes get a small purple ADMIN pill in their top-right corner. Leaf items in muted grey hang off a thin connecting line from each child. Footer caption below the tree. NOT photographic. Aspect ratio 16:9.
